code:
sequenceDiagram
    title Docker Security Implementation Sequence
    
    participant Client as Client
    participant Apache as Apache Container
    participant Crowdsec as Crowdsec Agent
    participant Firewall as Firewall Bouncer
    participant PHP as PHP-FPM Container
    participant DB as MariaDB Container
    participant DinD as Docker-in-Docker
    
    Note over Client, DinD: Network Security
    
    Client->>Apache: HTTP/HTTPS Request
    
    %% Crowdsec Security Flow
    Apache->>Crowdsec: Log request for analysis
    Crowdsec->>Crowdsec: Parse and analyze logs
    
    alt Malicious Request Detected
        Crowdsec->>Firewall: Add client IP to blocklist
        Firewall->>Client: Block future requests
        Apache->>Client: Return 403 Forbidden
    else Request Allowed
        Apache->>PHP: Forward request via Unix socket
    end
    
    %% Container Isolation
    Note over Apache, DB: Container Security Isolation
    
    %% User permission security
    Apache->>Apache: Run as non-root user (CloudNative_DockerImage)
    PHP->>PHP: Run as non-root user (CloudNative_Serverless)
    DB->>DB: Run with limited privileges
    
    %% Volume permissions
    Note over Apache, DB: Volume Security
    Apache->>Apache: Access socket with specific permissions
    PHP->>PHP: Access socket with specific permissions
    
    %% HTTPS communication
    Client->>Apache: HTTPS Request
    Apache->>Apache: SSL Termination with server.crt/key
    Apache->>PHP: Internal communication over Unix socket
    
    %% Security Headers
    PHP->>Apache: Response with generated content
    Apache->>Apache: Add security headers
    Apache->>Client: Response with security headers
    
    %% DinD Security
    Note over DinD: Docker-in-Docker Security
    DinD->>DinD: Run with privileged mode
    DinD->>DinD: SSH access with authentication

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为这套容器化架构画一个安全时序图，重点是展示从客户端请求到数据库响应的完整安全链路。核心参与者包括Client、Apache容器、Crowdsec Agent、Firewall Bouncer、PHP-FPM、MariaDB，还有一个Docker-in-Docker节点。
明白，Crowdsec和Firewall Bouncer的协作关系需要重点体现——是Crowdsec检测到威胁后通知Firewall去封禁IP吗？还有DinD节点放在什么位置比较合适？
对的，Crowdsec解析Apache日志后，一旦发现恶意请求就通知Firewall Bouncer把客户端IP加入黑名单。DinD作为独立的安全边界节点，放在最右侧，标注它需要特权模式和SSH认证。
好的，我已经把六个主要参与者和DinD都摆好了，顶部加了"Network Security"的注释横跨所有节点。现在画第一条线：Client到Apache的HTTP/HTTPS请求。
接下来要体现Crowdsec的安全检测流程。Apache把日志发给Crowdsec，Crowdsec自己内部做解析分析，这里要用alt分支——检测到恶意请求就走封禁流程，正常请求就转发给PHP-FPM。
分支画好了：Malicious Request Detected路径是Crowdsec通知Firewall加黑名单，Firewall阻断Client，Apache返回403；Request Allowed路径是Apache通过Unix socket转发给PHP-FPM。
还需要加上容器安全隔离的细节。Apache和PHP-FPM都要标注以非root用户运行，分别对应CloudNative_DockerImage和CloudNative_Serverless两个安全基线。MariaDB用limited privileges。
收到，这三个自环消息都加上了。Volume Security部分需要体现socket访问权限吗？还有SSL终止是在Apache这层处理吧？
是的，Apache和PHP-FPM都要有socket权限注释。SSL终止在Apache做，用server.crt和key，然后内部走Unix socket通信。最后别忘了安全头——PHP把响应给Apache，Apache加上security headers再返回给Client。
都补上了：Volume Security注释、HTTPS请求线、SSL终止、内部socket通信、带安全头的完整响应链。DinD那边也标注了privileged mode和SSH authentication。
完美，这个时序图完整覆盖了网络层安全、容器隔离、权限控制、传输加密和DinD特殊安全要求。可以定稿了。
